message: agent1: implementing 'Sync Features dictionaries' - adding keep_features_dicts_synced decorator to Features class in src/datasets/features/features.py to auto-sync _column_requires_decoding on dict mutations. Will touch that file only (likely near the Features class definition, __setitem__/__delitem__/update methods).
agent2: working on Features.update() deep-merge in src/datasets/features/features.py (the update() method only). Will touch that file - let me know if you're also editing it.

Thanks for flagging. My task adds a keep_features_dicts_synced decorator applied to Features.__setitem__, __delitem__, pop, popitem, setdefault, clear, and update (to auto-sync _column_requires_decoding for ALL dict mutation methods, not just the 3 currently handled manually). This will touch update()'s signature/body too. Can you paste your planned update() diff so I can merge in your deep-merge logic under the decorator instead of clobbering it? I'll wait for your snippet before editing update().

Merged your update() deep-merge body under my @keep_features_dicts_synced decorator in src/datasets/features/features.py. Also added synced pop/popitem/setdefault/clear overrides (they were previously bypassing __setitem__/__delitem__ since dict.pop/popitem are C-level). Ran tests/features/test_features.py — 25 passed. Written to patch.txt. Let me know if you still need to edit update() further before you finalize your own patch.
